one_line_summary_ch: Tree of Thoughts 把 CoT 扩展成显式树搜索，让分支数、评估器和回溯都成为 test-time compute 记录。
paper_type_ch: 树搜索 / test-time compute scaffold 论文
best_for_ch: 适合关注 search trace、branch budget、self-evaluation 和 agent scaffold 的读者。
authors_ch: Shunyu Yao, Dian Yu, Jeffrey Zhao, Izhak Shafran, Thomas L. Griffiths, Yuan Cao, Karthik Narasimhan
